name: @tran-quil/pi-rose-pine
description: All 3 Rosé Pine theme variants for Pi Coding Agent - All natural pine, faux fur and a bit of soho vibes for the classy minimalist
readme:
Rosé Pine for Pi Coding Agent

All natural pine, faux fur and a bit of soho vibes for the classy minimalist

## Install Install with pi: ```pi install npm:@tran-quil/pi-rose-pine``` ## Design notes Follows official [Rosé Pine](https://rosepinetheme.com/) colors. ## License This project is licensed under the MIT License - see the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file for details.
